name: Wandering Trader
description:
As you're busy tending to your farm at your base, an annoying pest randomly appears out of no where and now you're left to deal with it.

The Wandering Trader is nice, friendly even. He will trade, talk, and annoy. You can kill him if you want lol

You can add whatever you want to wear since I personally didnt know if my choice of attire would match what the audience (you guys) like.

Please let me know in the comments on what I should improve or get rid of!
creator: Cr1ms0nnnnn
